Meta layoffs: Employees told to work from home as countdown begins for 4 am
description: Meta is laying off around 8,000 employees on Wednesday, May 20, with notification emails going out in three regional waves starting at 4 AM local time. A leaked memo from HR chief Janelle Gale tells North American staff to work from home as the cuts roll out. Meanwhile, 7,000 workers are being reassigned to four new AI-focused organisations as Mark Zuckerberg restructures Meta around flatter teams, fewer managers, and a $145 billion AI bet.

title: Ronda Rousey’s net worth 2026: Earnings, endorsements and lifestyle
description: Ronda Rousey, a trailblazer in combat sports, is projected to have a net worth of nearly $14 million by 2026. Her fortune stems from lucrative UFC and WWE careers, acting, endorsements, and book sales. Rousey's impact on women's MMA and her transition to WWE cemented her status as a crossover star, ensuring her continued relevance and earning potential.

title: Fact check: Was Aaron Rodgers seen with wife after Steelers contract?
description: Aaron Rodgers, the NFL veteran, recently signed a one year deal with the Pittsburgh Steelers, as retirement rumors dominated the headlines, sparking chaos among millions of fans. Amid all the speculations, the spotlight remains on Aaron Rodgers’ wife even as he continues to maintain privacy about his marital life. Through all of this, a picture of Aaron Rodgers with a woman has convinced millions that the identity of his wife has finally been revealed.
